betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Exposure Chamber§f bombards materials with §bhigh-energy particles§f to transmute elements. The most efficient method for producing §bSchrabidium§f at scale.

§eKey Recipe:§f
§b8x Uranium-238§f + §b1x Higgs Boson Capsule§f = §b8x Schrabidium Ingots§f
§a(100% conversion efficiency)§f

§eOperation:§f
• Requires particles from a §bParticle Accelerator§f
• Insert target materials and particle capsules
• High-energy bombardment causes nuclear transmutation

§eOther Uses:§f
• Various element transmutations
• Advanced isotope production
• End-game material processing

§c§4RADIATION HAZARD:§f The chamber emits intense radiation during operation. Full hazmat protection required in vicinity.

§aTips:§f
• §aBest method for bulk Schrabidium§f production (meteor mining is too slow)
• Automate Higgs Boson Capsule production for continuous operation
• Pair with Particle Accelerator for complete transmutation setup
